hero.description: Generate QR codes for URLs, WiFi networks, vCards, SMS, email, and plain text right in your browser. No signup. No subscription. No files sent to our servers. Just generate and download.
hero.cta: Generate a QR Code Now — No Account Needed
hero.subtext: Works on any device. Download as PNG or SVG.

whyWeExist.title: Why We Exist
whyWeExist.problem: Most "free" QR code generators aren't really free!
whyWeExist.detail: You fill in your details, customise the design, go to download — and hit a paywall. Some charge monthly subscriptions. Some slap their branding on your QR code. Some quietly store your data on their servers.
whyWeExist.solution: Simplified QR is different. Everything runs in your browser. Your data is never uploaded anywhere. Generating is free. Downloading is free. Always.
whyWeExist.note: You NEVER need an account to generate QR codes. No watermarks, no branding, no subscriptions.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Three steps. No account. No waiting.
howItWorks.step1Desc1: Type a URL, WiFi password, contact info,
howItWorks.step1Desc3: Nothing is sent to any server.
howItWorks.step2Desc2: Add a logo if you want.
howItWorks.step2Desc3: Preview updates live as you type.
howItWorks.step3Desc1: Click download and save as PNG or SVG.

features.label: What You Can Do
features.title: Every QR code type you need.
features.feature1Desc: Generate QR codes that open any website or link. Perfect for business cards, flyers, menus, and anywhere you want to bridge print and digital.
features.feature2Desc: Let guests connect to your WiFi by scanning a code — no typing required. Supports WPA2, WEP, and open networks.
features.feature3Desc: Share your contact details with a scan. Name, phone, email, and organisation — all saved instantly to the scanner's contacts.
features.feature4Desc: Pre-fill a text message with a recipient number and body text. One scan opens the Messages app ready to send.
features.feature5Desc: Pre-address an email with recipient, subject, and body. Ideal for feedback forms, support requests, and contact pages.
features.feature6Desc: Encode any plain text — notes, coupons, serial numbers, instructions. Simple and universally readable.
features.feature7Desc: Download your QR code as a high-resolution PNG for screens or as a scalable SVG for print. No watermarks. No branding.
features.feature8Desc: Your content never leaves your device. No cloud storage. No third-party access. What you encode is only ever seen by you.

privacy.label: Privacy By Design
privacy.title: Your QR code data is none of our business.
privacy.para1: When you generate a QR code with WiFi passwords, personal contact info, or private URLs in most tools, you're sending that data to a stranger's server. You're trusting their security. Their staff. Their privacy policy buried in 8,000 words of legal text.
privacy.para2: Simplified QR works differently. All processing happens inside your own browser, on your own device. When you generate a QR code, the data never leaves your machine — it doesn't touch our servers because it never gets sent to them.
privacy.para3: No account means no data to breach. No uploads mean no exposure. Simple.

comparison.label: Why We Exist
comparison.title: Why most "free" QR generators aren't actually free
comparison.note: We built Simplified QR because we got tired of the same bait-and-switch. You search for "free QR code generator", you find one, you customise it, you click download — and suddenly it's $12 a month or it adds a watermark. That's not free. Simplified QR will always let you download your QR codes for free.

useCases.title: Built for every everyday use case
useCases.case1: Sharing a website on a flyer
useCases.case2: Guest WiFi at cafes and offices
useCases.case8: Print media linking to online content

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.faq_a1: Yes. Generating QR codes for any content type and downloading them as PNG or SVG are completely free. No trial period, no credit card required, no subscription. We mean it.
faq.faq_q2: Do I need to create an account?
faq.faq_a2: No. You can generate and download a QR code right now without signing up for anything. An optional account may be added in the future for saving history across devices, but the core generator will always be free and require no account.
faq.faq_q3: Is my data uploaded to your servers?
faq.faq_a3: No. Everything runs inside your browser on your own device. The content you encode into QR codes is never sent to our servers. We don't see it, store it, or have any access to it.
faq.faq_q4: Are there watermarks on downloaded QR codes?
faq.faq_a4: No. Your downloaded QR code is clean. No watermarks, no branding added to your files.
faq.faq_q5: What QR code types can I generate?
faq.faq_a5: You can generate QR codes for URLs, WiFi networks (WPA2/WEP/open), vCard contacts, SMS messages, email addresses with subject and body, and plain text. More types may be added over time.
faq.faq_a6: You can download your QR code as a PNG (great for screens, presentations, and social media) or as an SVG (scalable vector format, perfect for print and high-resolution use).
faq.faq_a7: Yes. Once you've loaded Simplified QR in your browser, the generator works without an internet connection. Your QR code history is stored locally on your device.
faq.faq_q8: Is Simplified QR available on mobile?
faq.faq_a8: Yes. Simplified QR works in any modern mobile browser on iOS and Android. You can even install it to your home screen for quick access.
faq.faq_q9: How does Simplified QR make money if it's free?
faq.faq_a9: Simplified QR is sustained by optional donations from users who find it useful and want to support it. That's it. There are no hidden revenue streams that compromise your privacy.

finalCta.subtext: No account. No subscription. No watermarks. No nonsense.
finalCta.cta: Generate Your QR Code — It's Free
finalCta.note: Your data never leaves your browser.

footer.tagline: The free QR code generator with no catch. Built by developers who got tired of QR code paywalls.
footer.copyright: © 2025 Simplified QR · Made with ☕ · No data uploaded in the making of this generator

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.shortVersionBefore: Simplified QR is built on a simple principle:
privacy.shortVersionAfter: Nothing you generate in Simplified QR is ever uploaded to our servers, stored on our systems, or seen by us. Everything runs inside your browser, on your own device.
privacy.filesP1: When you open a PDF in Simplified QR, the file is loaded directly into your browser using the Web File API. No bytes of that file are transmitted to any server — ours or anyone else's.
privacy.filesP2: When you add text, draw a signature, or make any other edit, those changes are applied locally using PDF.js and related browser-based libraries. Again: no server involved.
privacy.filesP3: When you click download, your edited PDF is generated in your browser and saved directly to your device — just like saving any other file. Nothing is routed through our infrastructure.
privacy.filesP4: Your documents, signatures, and saved files are stored in your browser's local storage (IndexedDB). They are only accessible from the device and browser you used. They are not synced to any cloud. Clearing your browser data will remove them.
privacy.collectIntro: Simplified QR collects minimal, non-personal data to keep the service running and understand basic usage patterns:
privacy.collectItem1Desc: — page views, rough geographic region (country-level), browser type, and device category. This data is aggregated and contains no personally identifiable information.
privacy.collectItem2Desc: — if the editor encounters a technical error, we may log anonymised error information (no file content) to help fix bugs.
privacy.collectItem3Desc: — if you choose to make a donation, payment is handled by our payment processor (Stripe). We do not store your card details. We receive a record of the transaction amount and a non-reversible transaction ID.
privacy.collectOutro: We do not collect names, email addresses, or account information from users of the free editor. We do not sell any data to third parties.
privacy.cookiesText: Simplified QR uses no advertising cookies and no cross-site tracking cookies. We may use a minimal session cookie if you create an optional account, purely to keep you signed in. Analytics data is collected without cookies where possible.
privacy.thirdParty1Desc: — Simplified QR is hosted on Vercel. Vercel receives standard web server logs (IP address, request path, timestamp) for infrastructure purposes. See Vercel's privacy policy for details.
privacy.thirdParty2Desc: — optional donations are processed by Stripe. Your payment data is governed by Stripe's privacy policy.
privacy.rightsText: Because we hold virtually no personal data about you, there is very little to request, correct, or delete. But if you have any questions or concerns about data we might hold, contact us at:
privacy.changesText: We may update this policy occasionally. The date at the top of this page will always reflect when it was last changed. We will never make changes that compromise the core privacy principle: your data is yours and it never leaves your device.

wifiQr.heroHeadline: Let Anyone Join Your WiFi With One Scan
wifiQr.heroDescription: Stop telling guests your WiFi password letter by letter. Generate a QR code they scan once — and they're connected. No typing, no mistakes, no friction.
wifiQr.heroNote: No account needed. Download as PNG or SVG.
wifiQr.step1Desc1: Type your WiFi name (SSID) and password.
wifiQr.step1Desc2: Choose your network type: WPA2, WEP, or open.
wifiQr.step1Desc3: Nothing is sent to any server. Ever.
wifiQr.step2Desc1: Pick colours that match your brand or space.
wifiQr.step2Desc2: Choose a dot style. Add a logo if you like.
wifiQr.step2Desc3: Live preview updates as you type.
wifiQr.step3Desc1: Download as PNG for printing or SVG for scaling.
wifiQr.step3Desc2: No watermarks. No branding. Just your QR code.
wifiQr.step3Desc3: Print it, frame it, stick it — it's yours.
wifiQr.whyTitle: Your password stays on your device.
wifiQr.diff1Desc: Your WiFi password is never sent anywhere. The QR code is generated entirely in your browser using JavaScript. Close the tab and it's gone.
wifiQr.diff2Desc: Other generators add their logo to your QR code unless you pay. We don't. Your QR code is clean, professional, and completely yours.
wifiQr.diff3Desc: iOS Camera app and Android can both scan WiFi QR codes natively. No extra app needed. Your guests just point and connect.
wifiQr.diff4Title: WPA2, WPA3, WEP, and Open Networks
wifiQr.diff4Desc: Whatever security type your router uses, we support it. Generate the right code for your exact setup.
wifiQr.useCasesTitle: Perfect for anyone who shares their network.
wifiQr.uc1Desc: Frame it on the counter or print it on the menu. Guests connect without asking.
wifiQr.uc2Desc: Welcome guests with a professional QR code in the welcome pack. Frictionless check-in.
wifiQr.uc3Desc: Guest WiFi for visitors and meeting rooms. Scan once, no IT ticket needed.
wifiQr.uc4Desc: Post WiFi QR codes at the entrance, on lanyards, or in the programme. Everyone connects instantly.
wifiQr.faq_a1: Yes. Your WiFi password never leaves your device. The QR code is generated entirely in your browser — we never see it, store it, or transmit it to any server.
wifiQr.faq_q2: What phones can scan WiFi QR codes?
wifiQr.faq_a2: All modern iPhones (iOS 11+) and Android phones (Android 9+) can scan WiFi QR codes directly with the default camera app — no extra app required.
wifiQr.faq_q3: What network security types are supported?
wifiQr.faq_a3: We support WPA, WPA2, WPA3, WEP, and open (no password) networks. Select your type from the dropdown when generating your code.
wifiQr.faq_q4: If I change my WiFi password, do I need a new QR code?
wifiQr.faq_a4: Yes. The password is encoded directly in the QR code, so if you change it, you'll need to generate a new one. It takes about 30 seconds.
wifiQr.faq_q5: Can I customise the look of the QR code?
wifiQr.faq_a5: Yes — choose custom colours, dot styles, and add a logo. The QR code remains scannable regardless of colour as long as there's sufficient contrast.
wifiQr.faq_a6: Yes, completely. There's no free trial, no watermarks, no premium tier for downloads. Generate as many WiFi QR codes as you need, download them all, free forever.
wifiQr.finalCtaSubtext: Generate a WiFi QR code right now — no account, no subscription, no fuss.

vcardQr.heroHeadline: Your Entire Contact Card, In One Scan
vcardQr.heroDescription: Stop handing over paper business cards that get lost. Generate a QR code that saves your name, phone, email, and company directly to anyone's contacts with a single scan.
vcardQr.heroNote: No account needed. Download as PNG or SVG.
vcardQr.howItWorksTitle: Fill in your details. Download. Done.
vcardQr.step2Desc2: Add your company logo to the centre.
vcardQr.step2Desc3: Preview updates live as you type.
vcardQr.step3Desc1: Download as PNG for business cards or SVG for large prints.
vcardQr.step3Desc3: Add to email signatures, websites, and LinkedIn.
vcardQr.whyTitle: A business card people actually keep.
vcardQr.diff1Desc: When someone scans your QR code, their phone prompts them to save your contact immediately. No manual typing, no lost slips of paper.
vcardQr.diff2Desc: Works on every smartphone — iOS, Android, and everything else. The vCard format is the global standard for contact exchange.
vcardQr.diff3Title: Your Data Stays on Your Device
vcardQr.diff3Desc: Your contact details are encoded into the QR code entirely in your browser. We never see them, store them, or share them.
vcardQr.diff4Desc: Generate a professional-quality contact QR code in under a minute. No signup form, no email verification, no subscription.
vcardQr.uc1Desc: Print the QR code on your card. One scan saves all your details — phone, email, company, and website.
vcardQr.uc2Desc: Flash your QR code instead of fumbling for cards. Instant contact exchange that actually works.
vcardQr.uc3Desc: Add your contact QR code to your email footer. Recipients can save your details with a quick phone scan.
vcardQr.uc4Desc: Display your QR code at your booth. Customers take your details without taking a card.
vcardQr.faq_q1: What information can I include in a vCard QR code?
vcardQr.faq_a1: You can include your full name, phone number, email address, company name, job title, website URL, and physical address. All fields are optional — just fill in what you want to share.
vcardQr.faq_q2: How do people scan a vCard QR code?
vcardQr.faq_a2: On iPhone, just open the Camera app and point it at the QR code — it will offer to save the contact. On Android, most default camera apps work the same way. No extra app needed.
vcardQr.faq_a3: Yes. Your details are encoded into the QR code entirely in your browser. Nothing is sent to our servers or stored anywhere — the generated QR code contains the data directly.
vcardQr.faq_q4: Can I update the information in my QR code?
vcardQr.faq_a4: Since the data is baked directly into the QR code (not a link), changing your details means generating a new code. It only takes a minute. For frequently-updated contacts, consider a URL QR code pointing to your online profile.
vcardQr.faq_a5: vCard is the universal standard file format for contact information. It's supported by every major operating system and email client — including Apple Contacts, Google Contacts, and Outlook.
vcardQr.faq_a6: Yes, completely free. No account required, no download limits, no watermarks. Generate and download as many contact QR codes as you need.
vcardQr.finalCtaSubtext: Generate your contact QR code now — print it, share it, own it.

qrTiger.heroDescription: QR Tiger is a solid tool — but their free plan adds watermarks, limits downloads, and locks their best features behind a subscription. Simplified QR gives you the core features that matter, free forever.
qrTiger.heroPriceNote: QR Tiger Dynamic QR plan: from $7/month
qrTiger.heroNote: No subscription. No watermarks. No account required.
qrTiger.win1Desc: No free trial. No feature limits with a paywall looming. Simplified QR is free to generate, free to download, free forever. No credit card required.
qrTiger.win2Desc: QR Tiger adds their branding to free downloads. Every Simplified QR download is clean, professional, and ready to print without their logo on it.
qrTiger.win3Desc: You don't need to create an account to use any feature. Open the generator, create your QR code, download it, done. No email, no verification, no friction.
qrTiger.win4Desc: QR Tiger processes QR codes on their servers. Simplified QR generates everything in your browser — your URLs, contact details, and WiFi passwords never leave your device.
qrTiger.theyWinDesc: We believe in honest comparisons. Here's what QR Tiger does that we don't.
qrTiger.limit1Desc: QR Tiger lets you change where a QR code points after you've printed it. We only support static QR codes — the destination is fixed when you generate.
qrTiger.limit2Desc: QR Tiger tracks how many times each code is scanned, where, and on what device. We deliberately don't track scans — it's a privacy choice.
qrTiger.limit3Desc: QR Tiger has a dashboard to organise and manage all your QR codes. We don't have a dashboard — each code is independent.
qrTiger.faq_q1: Why would I use Simplified QR instead of QR Tiger?
qrTiger.faq_a1: If you need static QR codes that you download and use — for WiFi, contact cards, URLs, or SMS — and you don't want to pay or create an account, Simplified QR is the better choice. If you need dynamic codes with scan tracking, QR Tiger's paid plans are worth considering.
qrTiger.faq_a2: Never. Every QR code you download — PNG or SVG — is clean and watermark-free. That's a core promise, not a paid feature.
qrTiger.faq_q3: Can I generate the same QR code types as QR Tiger?
qrTiger.faq_a3: For static codes, yes. We support URL, WiFi, vCard, SMS, email, and plain text — the same types most people actually need. We don't support dynamic codes, which change destination after printing.
qrTiger.faq_a4: Yes. There's no premium plan, no trial expiry, no feature flags waiting to be unlocked. The generator, all QR types, PNG downloads, and SVG downloads are all free.
qrTiger.faq_a5: Unlike server-side generators, Simplified QR runs entirely in your browser. Your data — URLs, WiFi passwords, contact details — is never sent to our servers. We can't see it. We don't want to.
qrTiger.finalCtaSubtext: Generate your first QR code right now — no account, no subscription, no watermarks.
qrTiger.finalCtaNote: No signup. No payment. No watermarks.

qrcodeMonkey.heroHeadline: All the QR Codes You Need. Actually Free.
qrcodeMonkey.heroDescription: QRCode Monkey is popular — but they add watermarks to free downloads and limit high-resolution exports. Simplified QR gives you clean, watermark-free PNG and SVG downloads. No catches.
qrcodeMonkey.heroPriceNote: QRCode Monkey adds watermarks to free QR code downloads
qrcodeMonkey.heroNote: No watermarks. No limits. No account required.
qrcodeMonkey.win1Desc: QRCode Monkey adds their watermark to free QR code downloads. Every Simplified QR PNG and SVG you download is completely clean — no logos, no branding, just your QR code.
qrcodeMonkey.win2Desc: SVG files scale to any size without quality loss — essential for printing. QRCode Monkey charges for SVG. We don't. Download SVG free, every time.
qrcodeMonkey.win3Desc: QRCode Monkey generates QR codes on their servers — your data passes through their systems. Simplified QR runs entirely in your browser. Your data never leaves your device.
qrcodeMonkey.win4Desc: Open the app, type your content, download your QR code. No signup form, no email verification, no dashboard to navigate. Just generate and go.
qrcodeMonkey.theyWinDesc: We're not here to trash the competition. Here's a fair look at where QRCode Monkey holds its own.
qrcodeMonkey.limit1Desc: QRCode Monkey has been around longer and has a large community. If you need community support or tutorials, they have more resources.
qrcodeMonkey.limit2Desc: QRCode Monkey offers a wider range of visual customisation templates and eye shapes. Simplified QR focuses on clean, practical customisation.
qrcodeMonkey.limit3Desc: For generating hundreds of QR codes at once from a spreadsheet, QRCode Monkey has bulk generation features. Simplified QR is designed for individual code creation.
qrcodeMonkey.faq_q1: Why does QRCode Monkey add watermarks?
qrcodeMonkey.faq_a1: QRCode Monkey uses watermarks as a monetisation strategy — pay to remove them. We don't believe in that model. Every download from Simplified QR is clean and watermark-free.
qrcodeMonkey.faq_q2: Are the QR codes the same quality?
qrcodeMonkey.faq_a2: Yes. Both generate standard QR codes that scan reliably with any smartphone camera. The difference is in what's included in the free tier — we include SVG and watermark-free PNG.
qrcodeMonkey.faq_a3: Yes. No plans, no tiers, no premium features. Generate any QR type (URL, WiFi, vCard, SMS, email, text), customise it, and download as PNG or SVG — all free.
qrcodeMonkey.faq_q4: What QR code types does Simplified QR support?
qrcodeMonkey.faq_a4: URL, WiFi, vCard (contact), SMS, Email, and plain text. These cover the vast majority of real-world use cases. All free to generate and download.
qrcodeMonkey.faq_q5: Why is privacy important for a QR code generator?
qrcodeMonkey.faq_a5: Your QR codes often contain sensitive information — WiFi passwords, home addresses, personal phone numbers. When those are processed on a third-party server, that company has access to them. Simplified QR generates everything in your browser so nobody else sees it.
qrcodeMonkey.finalCtaSubtext: No watermarks. No subscription. No account. Just generate and download.
